summary_translated: 通用大语言模型（如GPT和Claude）在医疗领域的出色表现引发了一个关键问题：领域特定的医疗专业模型是否会变得过时？我们认为，未来医疗人工智能的发展不应依赖于构建单一的医疗基础模型，也不应取代人类专家，而应致力于协调通用大语言模型、领域专用专业模型与临床医生之间的协作。我们提出了HetMedAgent——一种异构医疗多智能体框架，支持冲突感知的证据融合、基于不确定性的临床干预触发以及自适应阈值校准。在三个真实世界临床决策任务上的实验表明，通用大语言模型与领域专用专业模型之间的协同效应显著优于单独使用任一类型模型的表现，验证了专业模型在特定模态分析中的不可替代价值。HetMedAgent标志着从构建医疗LLM或基础模型转向多智能体协作，实现了通用推理能力与领域专精精度之间的平衡。

summary: LLM-based coding assistants are seeing rapid adoption, offering substantial gains in developer productivity. As organizations increasingly ship code these agents produce, the security of that code becomes critical. Prior work has shown that minor prompt perturbations degrade the functional correctness of LLM-generated code, but whether they also compromise code security has remained unstudied. We apply token-level mutations to prompts across three models and five programming languages, and show that mutations as small as a single-character change can flip generated code from secure to vulnerable. Probing the models' hidden states reveals that this fragility is partially encoded in prompt representations, but unevenly so. Input-handling vulnerabilities, where the model omits validation or sanitization, are more predictable (mean AUC 0.753) than secure-defaults vulnerabilities, where insecure code stems from one local choice such as a weak algorithm or unsafe parameter (mean AUC 0.674). These results show that the threat model for LLM-assisted coding extends beyond prompt injection to ordinary prompt variation, and indicate that input-handling flaws can be caught before generation while secure-defaults flaws require intervention during decoding.
title: Minimal Prompt Perturbations Lead to Code Vulnerabilities: Prompt Fragility and Hidden-State Signals in Coding LLMs
title_translated: 微小提示扰动引发代码漏洞：编码LLM中的提示脆弱性与隐状态信号
summary_translated: 基于大语言模型的编码助手正被快速采纳，显著提升了开发效率。随着组织越来越多地交付由这些智能体生成的代码，代码安全性变得至关重要。先前研究显示，轻微的提示扰动会降低LLM生成代码的功能正确性，但其是否也影响代码安全性尚无研究。我们对三种模型和五种编程语言的提示进行了逐标记变异，发现仅单字符变化就可能导致生成代码从安全变为存在漏洞。探测模型的隐状态揭示，这种脆弱性部分编码在提示表示中，但分布不均。输入处理类漏洞（如模型遗漏验证或清理）比默认安全类漏洞（如因局部选择使用弱算法或不安全参数导致的不安全代码）更具可预测性（平均AUC 0.753 vs. 0.674）。这些结果表明，LLM辅助编码的威胁模型不仅包括提示注入，还涵盖普通提示变化；其中输入处理缺陷可在生成前检测，而默认安全缺陷则需在解码过程中干预。

summary: Large language models in Agentic AI systems consume tool schemas and execution results and emit tool invocations as structured data. The default language for that exchange, JSON, was designed for application-to-application interchange rather than token efficiency, so its structural elements impose substantial token overhead. Recent work proposes token-optimized alternatives such as TOON (Token-Oriented Object Notation) and TRON (Token Reduced Object Notation) as more compact replacements, but these formats have been evaluated only on isolated comprehension or generation tasks. Whether their token reductions hold inside end-to-end agentic loops therefore remains an open question. We evaluate TOON and TRON on four agentic benchmarks (BFCL, MCPToolBenchPP, MCP-Universe, StableToolBench) and five open-weight LLMs, decoupling input compression from output compression to measure comprehension and generation independently. TRON reduces tokens by up to 27% with accuracy within 14pp of the JSON baseline. TOON achieves up to 18% reduction at a similar 9pp accuracy cost, but additionally cascades on multi-turn parsing failures and collapses parallel tool-call output for most models.
title: Notation Matters: A Benchmark Study of Token-Optimized Formats in Agentic AI Systems
title_translated: 符号很重要：面向智能体AI系统中令牌优化格式的基准研究
summary_translated: 在智能体AI系统中，大型语言模型会消耗工具模式和执行结果，并以结构化数据形式输出工具调用。默认的交换语言JSON是为应用程序间交互设计的，而非追求令牌效率，其结构元素带来了显著的令牌开销。近期工作提出了TOON（面向令牌的对象表示）和TRON（令牌缩减的对象表示）等令牌优化替代方案作为更紧凑的替换，但这些格式仅在孤立的理解或生成任务上进行过评估。因此，它们在端到端智能体循环中的令牌减少效果仍是一个未解问题。我们在四个智能体基准测试（BFCL、MCPToolBenchPP、MCP-Universe、StableToolBench）和五个开源权重LLM上评估了TOON和TRON，将输入压缩与输出压缩解耦，独立测量理解与生成能力。TRON在保持准确率与JSON基线相差不超过14个百分点的情况下，最多可减少27%的令牌；TOON实现最高18%的减少，准确率代价约为9个百分点，但此外还存在多轮解析失败时的级联效应，并导致大多数模型的并行工具调用输出崩溃。

summary: LLM agents acting in structured environments fail in operational rather than conversational ways, and reliability depends on procedural knowledge of the environment. Prior self-improvement methods accumulate natural-language guidance without checking that each new item preserves previously correct behavior, so a note that fixes one trajectory can silently regress another. We introduce GRASP (Gated Regression-Aware Skill Proposer), which treats agent improvement as a sequence of edits to a bounded skill library, admitting each candidate only if it produces a net improvement on a balanced held-out probe under a hard regression budget. We evaluate GRASP across five base models (gpt-oss-120b, DeepSeek V4 Flash, Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite, GPT-4.1, GPT-5.4) on two FHIR-based clinical benchmarks. On MedAgentBench, GRASP lifts gpt-oss-120b from 40.6% to 88.8%, exceeds the strongest of five self-improvement baselines by 21.0 points, and improves every other base model by 17.2 to 40.3 points. Ablations attribute the gain to comparative proposal generation, the acceptance gate, and the hard regression budget rather than to skill writing itself, which without validation is no better than using no skills. The mechanism generalizes beyond the clinical domain, improving agents on three of four non-clinical environments and remaining flat only where the action space is open-ended. Frozen libraries transfer across models, where skills from a stronger model improve weaker executors beyond what they learn for themselves while the reverse does not, an asymmetry that no ungated baseline reproduces.
title: GRASP: Gated Regression-Aware Skill Proposer for Self-Improving LLM Agents
title_translated: GRASP：用于自改进LLM智能体的门控回归感知技能提议器
summary_translated: 在结构化环境中运行的LLM智能体失败的原因在于操作性而非对话性，其可靠性依赖于对环境的过程性知识。先前的自改进方法累积自然语言指导，但未验证每个新条目是否保留了先前正确的行为，因此一条修复某个轨迹的注释可能悄然破坏另一个轨迹。我们提出GRASP（门控回归感知技能提议器），将智能体改进视为对有限技能库的一系列编辑，仅当候选项在平衡的保留探测集上产生净改进且满足严格的回归预算时才被接纳。我们在两个基于FHIR的临床基准测试上评估GRASP，涵盖五种基础模型（gpt-oss-120b、DeepSeek V4 Flash、Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite、GPT-4.1、GPT-5.4）。在MedAgentBench上，GRASP将gpt-oss-120b的性能从40.6%提升至88.8%，超过五个自改进基线中的最强者21.0分，并使其他所有基础模型均提升17.2至40.3分。消融实验表明，性能提升主要归因于比较性提议生成、接受门控机制以及硬回归预算，而非技能编写本身——无验证的技能编写并不优于不使用技能。该机制可泛化至非临床领域，在四个非临床环境中改善了三个，仅在动作空间开放的场景中表现持平。冻结的技能库可在不同模型间迁移：强模型的技能可提升弱执行器的表现，而反之则不行，这种不对称性是无门控基线无法再现的。

summary: Real-time safety filtering for large language model (LLM) applications requires classifiers that can detect unsafe prompts, toxic language, jailbreak attempts, and unsafe responses without the cost profile of large guardrail models, and that can distinguish benign sensitive text from genuinely covert harmful content. In this paper, we introduce Opir, a family of encoder-based guardrail models built on the GLiClass architecture. Opir includes multi-task models for binary safe/unsafe classification, multi-label toxicity classification, jailbreak classification, and zero-shot unsafe prompt and response categorization. We also release edge variants with fewer than 100M parameters dedicated to binary safe/unsafe categorization. The models are trained on a three-level taxonomy containing 996 categories across 16 top-level labels, 126 mid-level labels, and 854 leaf labels. Opir's training data combines taxonomy-grounded unsafe prompts, adversarially mined hard negatives, benign safety-preserving examples, generated response examples, multilingual translations, and portions of the Aegis2 and WildGuard training subsets. We also open-sourced an evaluation harness that supports GLiClass and GLiNER2 backends as well as decoder-based models, and covers binary safety classification, multi-label categorization, toxicity, jailbreak detection, prompt safety, response safety, response refusal, and prompt subcategory views across public benchmark families. Across an expanded comparison spanning 12 safety-classification tasks and 17 category tasks against eight contemporary guardrail systems -- including both GLiNER2-based and generative guardrail models -- Opir variants are competitive on or ahead of the strongest open-weight baselines on the majority of benchmark datasets while operating with a substantially smaller deployment footprint.
title: Opir: Efficient Multi-Task Safety Classification for Toxicity, Jailbreaks, Hate Speech, and Harmful Content
title_translated: Opir：高效多任务安全分类，用于毒性、越狱攻击、仇恨言论及有害内容检测
summary_translated: 大型语言模型（LLM）应用中的实时安全过滤需要能够检测不安全提示、有毒语言、越狱尝试和不安全响应的分类器，同时避免大型护栏模型的成本特征，并能区分良性敏感文本与真正隐蔽的有害内容。本文介绍Opir，一个基于GLiClass架构的编码器型护栏模型家族。Opir包含用于二元安全/不安全分类、多标签毒性分类、越狱分类以及零样本不安全提示与响应分类的多任务模型。我们还发布了参数少于100M的边缘版本，专门用于二元安全/不安全分类。这些模型在包含16个一级标签、126个二级标签和854个叶级标签共996类的三级分类体系下训练。Opir的训练数据结合了基于分类体系的不安全提示、对抗挖掘的困难负例、良性安全保留示例、生成的响应示例、多语言翻译以及Aegis2和WildGuard训练子集的部分数据。我们还开源了一个评估工具包，支持GLiClass和GLiNER2后端以及解码器型模型，覆盖二元安全分类、多标签分类、毒性检测、越狱识别、提示安全性、响应安全性、响应拒绝及提示子类别视图等多个公共基准族任务。在涵盖12项安全分类任务和17项类别任务的扩展对比中，Opir变体在多数基准数据集上表现优于或媲美最强的开源权重基线，同时具有显著更小的部署开销。

summary: Contrastive Language-Audio Pretraining (CLAP) models are widely used for audio understanding and support modality-agnostic condition swapping in many zero-shot applications. However, their performance is heavily affected by the modality gap between audio and text embeddings. Existing explanations mainly attribute this gap to the cone effect, treating it as a shift between mean embeddings, yet correcting the mean alone yields only limited improvements. Alternative hypotheses, such as information imbalance and dimensionality collapse, have also been proposed, but they remain insufficiently verified and have not been thoroughly studied in the audio domain. Meanwhile, several works attempt to decompose multimodal contrastive embeddings into interpretable concepts, but none explicitly analyze the modality gap from the perspective of concept decomposition. In this work, we introduce COMET (Concept space Organization and Modality gap Explanation with PLS-SVD Transformation), a novel partial least squares singular value decomposition (PLS-SVD) framework for CLAP that unveils a broader perspective of the modality gap. Our framework reveals that only a small, interpretable subset of axes, which captures shared concepts, contributes substantially to similarity computation, and that the mean component represents only partially the modality gap. Building on this insight, we propose a simple spectral truncation method that mitigates the modality gap in a training-free manner. The method enables zero-shot audio captioning with condition swapping to approach fully supervised performance, without requiring large auxiliary memory banks or expensive computation. At the same time, it achieves substantial embedding dimensionality reduction while preserving strong performance on retrieval and audio captioning tasks.
title: COMET: Concept Space Dissection of the Modality Gap in Audio-Text Multimodal Contrastive Embeddings
title_translated: COMET：音频-文本多模态对比嵌入中模态差距的概念空间剖析
summary_translated: 对比语言-音频预训练（CLAP）模型广泛应用于音频理解，并支持许多零样本应用中的模态无关条件切换。然而，其性能严重受音频与文本嵌入之间模态差距的影响。现有解释主要归因于锥形效应，将其视为均值嵌入之间的偏移，但仅校正均值只能带来有限改进。其他假设如信息不平衡和维度坍缩也被提出，但尚未充分验证，且在音频领域缺乏深入研究。与此同时，一些研究尝试将多模态对比嵌入分解为可解释概念，但尚未有研究从概念分解的角度明确分析模态差距。本文提出COMET（概念空间组织与模态差距解释的PLS-SVD变换框架），一种新颖的部分最小二乘奇异值分解（PLS-SVD）框架，用于CLAP模型，揭示了模态差距的更广阔视角。我们的框架发现，仅有少量可解释的轴（捕捉共享概念）对相似性计算贡献显著，而均值成分仅部分代表模态差距。基于此洞察，我们提出一种简单的谱截断方法，无需训练即可缓解模态差距。该方法使零样本音频字幕与条件切换接近全监督性能，无需大型辅助记忆库或昂贵计算。同时，它实现了显著的嵌入维度压缩，且在检索和音频字幕任务中保持强大性能。

summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have made strong progress on high-level image-text alignment, yet their ability to perceive subtle visual differences remains limited. We study this problem in rendered web interfaces, where localized visual changes are both a diagnostic test of fine-grained perception and a practical requirement for GUI agents and design tools. We introduce \textbf{DiffSpot}, a code-driven benchmark for open-ended spot-the-difference on web interfaces. DiffSpot constructs controlled image pairs by mutating a single CSS property of a target element in self-contained HTML, re-rendering the page, and recording the changed property, element, and mutation magnitude. A grounding gate retains only pairs whose rendered pixel difference is confined to the target element. The benchmark contains 4{,}400 pairs, including 3{,}900 has-diff pairs balanced across 13 CSS-property operators and three difficulty tiers, plus 500 no-diff pairs for hallucination control. Evaluating 13 frontier VLMs zero-shot, we find that even the best model identifies only $40.7\%$ of true changes, with Hard-tier Recall below $23\%$ for every model. DiffSpot further shows that difficulty is strongly property-dependent: across CSS operators, neither pixel magnitude nor CLIP distance reliably predicts Recall.
title: DiffSpot: Can VLMs Spot Fine-Grained Visual Differences in Web Interfaces?
title_translated: DiffSpot：视觉语言模型能否在网页界面中察觉细粒度视觉差异？
summary_translated: 视觉语言模型（VLMs）在高层次图像-文本对齐方面取得了显著进展，但其感知细微视觉差异的能力仍然有限。我们在渲染后的网页界面中研究这一问题，因为局部视觉变化既是细粒度感知的诊断测试，也是GUI智能体和设计工具的实际需求。我们引入	extbf{DiffSpot}，一个面向网页界面开放式找不同问题的代码驱动基准。DiffSpot通过修改单个目标元素的CSS属性（在自包含HTML中），重新渲染页面，并记录变化的属性、元素及变异幅度，构建受控图像对。一个定位门仅保留渲染像素差异局限于目标元素的图像对。该基准包含4,400对图像，包括3,900对含差异的图像（在13种CSS属性操作符和三个难度层级间平衡），以及500对无差异图像用于控制幻觉。对13个前沿VLM进行零样本评估，我们发现即使最佳模型也仅能识别出40.7%的真实变化，且所有模型在高难度层级上的召回率均低于23%。DiffSpot进一步表明，难度强烈依赖于具体属性：在不同CSS操作符之间，像素幅度或CLIP距离均无法可靠预测召回率。

summary: Although large language model (LLM) based multi-agent systems (MAS) show their capability to solve complex tasks and achieve higher performance over single agent systems, they lead to huge computational overheads because of heavy communication between agents. Previous research has made efforts to train a sparse multi-agent graph or fine-tune a planner to orchestrate the workflow better. However, such extra training processes introduce computational costs and limit MAS to specific domains, therefore compromising their generalizability. In this paper, we propose CONCAT, a training-free multi-agent collaboration framework based on CONsensus and Confidence-driven Ad hoc Teaming to efficiently organize agent interactions. Specifically, agents are clustered based on their initial answers, and leaders of each cluster are selected based on the agents' confidence. Then, a heuristic function based on the Theory of Mind is designed to predict the collaboration benefits between every two leaders according to their answers and confidence. Finally, an ad hoc multi-agent network is organized after evicting a percentage of communications based on the predicted benefits. Experiments across three LLMs and three benchmarks show that CONCAT achieves up to 2.02x higher efficiency (accuracy/latency ratio) than LLM-Debate and outperforms training-aware methods such as AgentDropout, while reducing average latency by 50.1% on Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct, without any task-specific training.
title: CONCAT: Consensus- and Confidence-Driven Ad Hoc Teaming for Efficient LLM-Based Multi-Agent Systems
title_translated: CONCAT：基于共识与置信度的即兴协作以实现高效的大语言模型多智能体系统
summary_translated: 尽管基于大语言模型（LLM）的多智能体系统（MAS）在解决复杂任务方面展现出能力，并优于单智能体系统，但其因智能体间频繁通信导致巨大的计算开销。以往研究尝试通过训练稀疏多智能体图或微调规划器来优化工作流，然而这些额外的训练过程引入了计算成本，并限制了系统的通用性。本文提出CONCAT，一种无需训练的多智能体协作框架，基于共识与置信度驱动的即兴协作，以高效组织智能体交互。具体而言，智能体根据初始回答进行聚类，依据置信度选择各集群的领导者；设计了一种基于心理理论的启发式函数，根据答案和置信度预测每对领导者的协作收益；最后，基于预测收益剔除部分通信，构建即兴多智能体网络。在三个LLM和三个基准上的实验表明，CONCAT在准确率/延迟比上相比LLM-Debate最高提升2.02倍，优于如AgentDropout等需训练的方法，同时在Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct上平均延迟降低50.1%，且无需任何特定任务训练。

summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown promise as educational tutors, yet effective tutoring requires more than solving problems: it must provide progressive Socratic guidance and balance multiple pedagogical objectives across multi-turn interactions. However, training such tutors remains challenging due to limited-fidelity and weakly controllable student simulation, under-specified pedagogical reward modeling, and unstable multi-objective optimization. To overcome these limitations, we propose PEARL, a pedagogically aligned reinforcement learning framework for training Socratic tutoring agents, consisting of three key components. First, we introduce a controllable student simulator that decouples latent cognitive states from response generation to model diverse abilities and misconceptions. Second, we develop a generative reward model that jointly evaluates pedagogical quality and objective correctness for policy optimization. Finally, we propose a stable multi-objective RL scheme that discretizes rewards within each dimension and aggregates normalized advantages across dimensions, preventing high-variance objectives from dominating updates. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that PEARL achieves the best performance among open-source models and remains competitive with leading proprietary LLMs, despite using only a 30B policy model.
title: PEARL: Training Socratic Tutors with Pedagogically Aligned Reinforcement Learning
title_translated: PEARL：基于教育对齐强化学习训练苏格拉底式导师
summary_translated: 大语言模型（LLMs）在作为教育导师方面展现出潜力，但有效的辅导不仅需要解决问题，还需提供渐进式的苏格拉底式引导，并在多轮交互中平衡多种教育目标。然而，由于学生模拟的保真度有限、控制能力弱、教育奖励建模不明确以及多目标优化不稳定，训练此类导师仍具挑战性。为此，我们提出PEARL，一种用于训练苏格拉底式辅导智能体的教育对齐强化学习框架，包含三个关键组件：首先，引入可控制的学生模拟器，将潜在认知状态与响应生成解耦，以建模多样能力和误解；其次，开发生成式奖励模型，联合评估教育质量与目标正确性以优化策略；最后，提出稳定的多目标强化学习方案，将各维度奖励离散化并聚合归一化优势，防止高方差目标主导更新。在多个基准上的实验表明，PEARL在开源模型中表现最佳，且即使仅使用30B策略模型，仍能与领先的专有LLM竞争。

summary: Pilot readback of Air Traffic Control (ATC) voice instructions is a primary safeguard against miscommunication in air transportation. However, readback anomalies remain implicated in approximately 80% of aviation incidents. This vulnerability is further exacerbated by rising traffic volume and elevated cognitive workload, thereby motivating automated readback monitoring by machine. Traditional rule-based and machine learning approaches struggle to generalize across the highly variable and evolving phraseology of air traffic controller-pilot communications. While Large Language Models (LLMs) have opened a new avenue through their strong reasoning and generalization capabilities, existing approaches still face deployment and computational barriers in practice. In this work, we propose Semantic reasoning for Communication via Open-set Plug-in with Examples (SCOPE), a novel lightweight-training LLM framework that advances both the efficiency and accuracy of machine-based ATC readback monitoring. The core idea is to couple a plug-in open-set classifier with a carefully designed in-context learning mechanism on top of a frozen LLM. Extensive experiments on the semi-synthetic communication dataset show that SCOPE attains superior accuracy while delivering the low-latency response required for operational environments. Under a few-shot setting, SCOPE achieves 91.05% accuracy in open-set detection and corrects 96.63% of anomalous readbacks, thereby outperforming the strongest available baselines while providing explanations for its decisions. These findings demonstrate the potential of our framework as a practical pathway toward interpretable and controllable ATC readback monitoring.
title: SCOPE: A Lightweight-training LLM Framework for Air Traffic Control Readback Monitoring
title_translated: SCOPE：面向空中交通管制复诵监控的轻量级训练大语言模型框架
summary_translated: 飞行员对空中交通管制（ATC）语音指令的复诵是航空运输中防止误传的主要保障措施。然而，复诵异常仍涉及约80%的航空事故。这一脆弱性因交通量上升和认知负荷增加而加剧，促使机器实现自动化复诵监控。传统基于规则和机器学习的方法难以在高度变化且不断演化的空管-飞行员沟通术语中实现泛化。虽然大语言模型凭借其强大的推理和泛化能力开辟了新路径，但现有方法在实际部署中仍面临性能与计算障碍。本文提出SCOPE（通过示例进行开放集插件语义推理），一种新颖的轻量级训练LLM框架，显著提升机器化ATC复诵监控的效率与准确性。核心思想是在冻结的LLM基础上，结合一个插件式开放集分类器与精心设计的上下文学习机制。在半合成通信数据集上的大量实验表明，SCOPE在保持低延迟响应的同时实现了优异的准确率。在少样本设置下，SCOPE在开放集检测中达到91.05%的准确率，并纠正了96.63%的异常复诵，优于最强基线，且能为决策提供解释。这些发现展示了该框架在可解释、可控的ATC复诵监控中的实用潜力。

summary: Tackling complex reasoning tasks typically relies on massive monolithic LLMs, which suffer from severe computational redundancy. While task decomposition through structured pipelines or multi-agent collaborations offers an alternative, these approaches inevitably fall into a critical dilemma: predefined static topologies are highly vulnerable to cascading errors, whereas unconstrained dynamic agents suffer from trajectory divergence and unpredictable memory bloat. To address this, we present DynaGraph, a lightweight multi-model framework driven by dynamic topological reconfiguration. At the execution level, DynaGraph multiplexes time-division PEFT adapters over a shared base model, enabling both full system training and inference deployment on a single consumer-grade GPU. At the routing level, the Evaluator continuously monitors execution confidence to trigger hierarchical self-healing: Fine-grained Patching for localized data gaps and Subgraph Reconstruction for severe logical ruptures. Experiments on StrategyQA, MATH, and FinQA demonstrate our 8B model closely approximates the reasoning capabilities of a 72B monolithic model (e.g., 87.6% on StrategyQA, 82.7% on MATH). Furthermore, it reduces latency by up to 68.1% and token consumption by 68.6% compared to unconstrained dynamic architectures.
title: DynaGraph: Lightweight Multi-Model Interaction Framework via Dynamic Topological Reconfiguration
title_translated: DynaGraph：通过动态拓扑重构实现轻量级多模型交互框架
summary_translated: 解决复杂推理任务通常依赖于庞大的单体大语言模型，但这类模型存在严重的计算冗余。尽管通过结构化流水线或多智能体协作进行任务分解是一种替代方案，但这些方法不可避免地陷入一个关键困境：预设的静态拓扑极易引发级联错误，而无约束的动态智能体则面临轨迹发散和不可预测的记忆膨胀问题。为应对这一挑战，我们提出DynaGraph，一种由动态拓扑重构驱动的轻量级多模型框架。在执行层面，DynaGraph在共享基础模型上复用时分PEFT适配器，实现在单个消费级GPU上同时支持全系统训练与推理部署。在路由层面，评估器持续监控执行置信度，触发分层自愈机制：针对局部数据缺口采用细粒度修补，针对严重逻辑断裂则进行子图重构。在StrategyQA、MATH和FinQA上的实验表明，我们的8B模型在推理能力上接近72B单体模型（如StrategyQA上达87.6%，MATH上达82.7%）。此外，相比无约束动态架构，其延迟降低高达68.1%，token消耗减少68.6%。

summary: Language models are increasingly being deployed for conversational support in informal caregiving contexts, where interactions often extend beyond information-seeking: caregivers seek emotional reassurance, guidance, and help, while navigating uncertain, relationally complex care decisions. Yet most safety evaluations assess model behavior under generic prompts, leaving a critical question unexamined: does a model's safety profile change with its support role? We study this by operationalizing four expert-reviewed support roles grounded in social support theory: Inform, Coach, Relate, and Listen, and comparing them against two baseline controls: a basic prompting condition and a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) condition. We evaluate across three language models (GPT-4o-mini, Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct, and MedGemma-1.5-4b-it) on 5,000 real-world queries from online Alzheimer's Disease and Related Dementias (ADRD) communities. We find that the LLM's support role systematically shapes both the prevalence and composition of interactional risks. Furthermore, a human evaluation study reveals a perceived quality--safety tension: more directive, information-oriented roles are rated as more helpful and trustworthy despite exhibiting elevated interactional risk profiles. We release ~90,000 support role-conditioned model responses with risk annotations as an ecologically grounded resource for research on safer LLM-mediated conversational support.
title: Inform, Coach, Relate, Listen: Auditing LLM Caregiving Support Roles
title_translated: 告知、指导、共情、倾听：审计大语言模型的照护支持角色
summary_translated: 语言模型正越来越多地被应用于非正式照护情境中的对话支持，其中互动往往超越信息查询：照护者寻求情感安慰、指导与帮助，同时在不确定且关系复杂的照护决策中前行。然而，大多数安全评估仅在通用提示下进行，未深入探讨一个关键问题：模型的安全表现是否会随其支持角色的变化而改变？我们通过操作化四个基于社会支持理论、经专家评审的支持角色——告知（Inform）、指导（Coach）、共情（Relate）和倾听（Listen），并与两个基线对照组（基本提示条件和检索增强生成RAG条件）进行比较。我们在三个语言模型（GPT-4o-mini、Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct和MedGemma-1.5-4b-it）上，对来自在线阿尔茨海默病及相关痴呆症（ADRD）社区的5,000个真实查询进行了评估。结果发现，模型的支持角色系统性地影响了互动风险的普遍性和构成。此外，人工评估研究揭示了感知质量与安全性之间的张力：更具指导性、信息导向的角色虽表现出更高的互动风险，但被评价为更有帮助和更可信。我们发布了约9万条受支持角色条件调控的模型响应及其风险标注，作为研究更安全的LLM对话支持的生态学基础资源。

summary: While GUI agents have advanced rapidly, they often lack the robustness to recover from their own errors, hindering real-world deployment. To bridge this gap at both the evaluation and data levels, we introduce GUI-RobustEval and propose Robustness-driven Trajectory Synthesis. GUI-RobustEval contains $1,216$ executable test cases that systematically measure error recovery capabilities across a broad and realistic spectrum of error modes. At the data level, RoTS is a scalable synthesis framework that creates $800k$ high-quality data via a tree-based pipeline that proactively discovers diverse error modes and synthesizes corresponding recovery steps. Our two models, RoTS-7B and RoTS-32B, fine-tuned on our dataset, both demonstrate significant gains on GUI-RobustEval and traditional GUI benchmarks. Notably, RoTS-32B achieves state-of-the-art performance on OSWorld, with a $47.4\%$ success rate and a $33.8\%$ All-Pass@4 score, suggesting that improved long-horizon error recovery ability contributes to both robustness and overall performance. Our code is available at https://github.com/AlibabaResearch/RoTS.
title: Recovering Policy-Induced Errors: Benchmarking and Trajectory Synthesis for Robust GUI Agents
comment: ICML 2026 Spotlight. 36 pages, 19 figures, includes appendix
title_translated: 恢复策略引发的错误：面向鲁棒GUI智能体的基准测试与轨迹合成
summary_translated: 尽管GUI智能体发展迅速，但往往缺乏从自身错误中恢复的能力，限制了其在现实世界中的部署。为在评估和数据层面弥合这一差距，我们提出了GUI-RobustEval，并引入了鲁棒性驱动的轨迹合成方法（RoTS）。GUI-RobustEval包含1216个可执行测试用例，系统地衡量了在广泛且真实的错误模式下错误恢复能力。在数据层面，RoTS是一个可扩展的合成框架，通过基于树的管道主动发现多样化的错误模式，并合成相应的恢复步骤，生成了80万条高质量数据。我们的两个模型RoTS-7B和RoTS-32B在该数据集上微调后，在GUI-RobustEval和传统GUI基准测试中均表现出显著提升。值得注意的是，RoTS-32B在OSWorld上达到47.4%的成功率和33.8%的All-Pass@4得分，表明改进的长时程错误恢复能力有助于提升鲁棒性和整体性能。代码已开源：https://github.com/AlibabaResearch/RoTS。

summary: Existing sentence-level watermarking methods enhance robustness to paraphrasing by anchoring watermarks in sentence semantics. However, their prefix-based designs remain vulnerable to structural perturbations, such as sentence splitting and merging, which commonly arise under strong paraphrasers like DIPPER and GPT-3.5. To mitigate this issue, we propose AliMark, a framework that reformulates sentence-level watermarking as a bit sequence encoding and alignment problem between a potentially watermarked text and a secret bit sequence. Notably, our approach adopts a two-stage detection strategy: we generate multiple restructured text variants and adaptively align their extracted bit sequences with the secret bit sequence to minimize alignment cost. This multi-candidate alignment design naturally improves robustness to sentence merges and splits. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AliMark substantially outperforms state-of-the-art baselines under diverse paraphrasing attacks.
title: AliMark: Enhancing Robustness of Sentence-Level Watermarking Against Text Paraphrasing
title_translated: AliMark：增强句子级水印对文本改写的鲁棒性
summary_translated: 现有的句子级水印方法通过将水印锚定在句子语义中来增强对改写的鲁棒性。然而，其基于前缀的设计仍易受结构扰动（如句子拆分与合并）的影响，这类扰动常见于DIPPER和GPT-3.5等强改写器。为缓解此问题，我们提出AliMark，将句子级水印重构为潜在带水印文本与秘密比特序列之间的比特序列编码与对齐问题。其核心采用两阶段检测策略：生成多个重构文本变体，并自适应地将其提取的比特序列与秘密比特序列对齐以最小化对齐成本。这种多候选对齐设计天然提升了对句子合并与拆分的鲁棒性。大量实验表明，AliMark在多种改写攻击下显著优于现有最先进基线。

summary: Automatic speech recognition (ASR) is a core component of human--computer interaction and an increasingly important front-end for LLM-based assistants and agents. However, most current ASR systems still follow a single-pass paradigm, which is poorly aligned with human communication, where misunderstandings are resolved through iterative clarification and refinement. This mismatch makes it difficult to correct meaning-critical errors once they occur. Meanwhile, token-level metrics such as WER or CER cannot adequately reflect such a problem. To address these limitations, we formulate \emph{Interactive ASR} as a multi-turn refinement task and propose \textbf{Agentic ASR}, a closed-loop framework that combines a single-pass ASR front-end with semantic correction, intent routing, and reasoning-based editing. We further introduce the \textbf{Sentence-level Semantic Error Rate} ($S^2ER$), an LLM-based semantic evaluation metric, together with an \textbf{Interactive Simulation System} for scalable and reproducible benchmarking. Experiments on multilingual, named-entity-intensive, and code-switching benchmarks show that iterative interaction consistently reduces semantic errors, with much larger gains in $S^2ER$ than in conventional token-level metrics. Human--AI alignment and ablation studies further validate the reliability of the semantic judge and the robustness of the proposed framework. The code is available at: https://interactiveasr.github.io/ and the live demo is available at https://i-asr.sjtuxlance.com/
title: Towards Human-Like Interactive Speech Recognition With Agentic Correction and Semantic Evaluation
title_translated: 迈向类人交互式语音识别：基于智能体纠错与语义评估
summary_translated: 自动语音识别（ASR）是人机交互的核心组件，也是基于大语言模型的助手与智能体日益重要的前端。然而，当前大多数ASR系统仍遵循单次处理范式，与人类沟通中通过迭代澄清与修正误解的方式不匹配，导致一旦出现语义关键错误便难以纠正。同时，词元级指标（如WER或CER）无法充分反映此类问题。为解决这些局限，我们将	extit{交互式ASR}建模为多轮精炼任务，并提出	extbf{智能体式ASR}，一种结合单次ASR前端与语义纠错、意图路由及基于推理的编辑的闭环框架。我们进一步引入	extbf{句子级语义错误率}（$S^2ER$），一种基于LLM的语义评估指标，以及一个	extbf{交互式模拟系统}，用于可扩展且可复现的基准测试。在多语言、命名实体密集型及代码混杂的基准测试上，实验表明迭代交互持续降低语义错误，且在$S^2ER$上的提升远大于传统词元级指标。人机对齐与消融研究进一步验证了语义判别器的可靠性与所提框架的鲁棒性。代码与在线演示已开放：https://interactiveasr.github.io/ 和 https://i-asr.sjtuxlance.com/

summary: We benchmark three supervised fine-tuned models against frontier zero-shot baselines on a 661-row held-out slice of PiSAR (Persona, intent, Screen, Action, Rationale), a 12,929-tuple corpus of screen-anchored behavioural rationales curated from public app-store reviews, Pew American Trends Panel demographics, and the OPeRA shopper traces. Every model, frontier or fine-tuned, is evaluated on the same 661-row slice with the same scoring pipeline. Two findings. First, frontier zero-shot baselines (Claude Opus 4.7 and GPT-5.5) reach sem_sim 0.459 and 0.482 respectively; a fine-tuned Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct reaches 0.783 and clears sem_sim >= 0.7 on 79% of rows, against 1-2% for either frontier baseline, a gap of 0.30 absolute on the same test set. Second, the same training data and recipe on Gemma-4-26B-A4B-IT scores only 0.441, in the same band as the frontier zero-shot baselines rather than the fine-tuned Qwen. We read this as a recipe-vs-model mismatch: the reasoning-tuned high-parameter model resists displacement and would likely need either more data or a stronger fine-tuning method.
title: Architecture-Sensitive Supervised Fine-Tuning for Screen-Conditioned Action Prediction: A PiSAR Benchmark
comment: 14 pages, 7 figures, 2 tables. PiSAR corpus and fine-tuned weights are proprietary to AprioriLabs; methodology and recipe released
title_translated: 面向屏幕条件动作预测的架构敏感监督微调：PiSAR基准
summary_translated: 我们在PiSAR（人物、意图、屏幕、动作、理由）这一由公开应用商店评论、Pew美国趋势面板人口统计信息及OPeRA购物者轨迹整理而成的12,929条屏幕锚定行为理由语料库中，选取661行作为保留测试集，对三种监督微调模型与前沿零样本基线进行基准测试。所有模型（无论前沿或微调）均在相同661行数据上使用统一评分流程评估。两项发现：第一，前沿零样本基线（Claude Opus 4.7和GPT-5.5）分别达到sem_sim 0.459和0.482；而微调后的Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct达到0.783，并在79%的行上实现sem_sim ≥ 0.7，远超前沿基线（仅1-2%），在同一测试集上绝对差距达0.30。第二，相同的训练数据与流程在Gemma-4-26B-A4B-IT上仅得0.441，与前沿零样本基线处于同一水平，而非微调Qwen的表现。我们认为这反映了训练配方与模型架构之间的不匹配：高参数量的推理优化模型具有较强抗干扰能力，可能需要更多数据或更强微调方法才能有效替代。

summary: AI tools are increasingly integrated into real-world workflows. However, existing measures of reliance on these tools focus on AI output adoption or on self-reported indicators, rather than how task effort is distributed between users and tools. Here, we introduce offloading score, a measure of reliance that quantifies the fraction of cognitive effort offloaded to an AI tool. Offloading Score is simulation-based -- we construct a counterfactual workflow by estimating how the user would have completed the task without the tool, and then computing the fraction of steps saved by using the tool. We validate offloading score through intrinsic evaluations of metric validity, and a controlled user study ($n=40$) with developers performing programming tasks using AI tools. We vary time pressure to test whether reliance measures capture the known increase in reliance under time pressure. We show that offloading score detects significantly higher reliance in time-constrained settings ($+43\%$, $p=0.018$), while usage-based and self-reported baseline measures of reliance do not distinguish the conditions. We complement this with descriptive insights showing that higher reliance manifests as greater delegation of subtasks to the tool and more direct reuse of AI outputs. Finally, we demonstrate an approach of using offloading score in combination with target outcomes of a task (e.g., code understanding) to identify when reliance may be (in)appropriate. Our framework offers two contributions: an instrument users can apply to measure and reflect on their own reliance, and a quantitative signal that agent designers can utilize to mitigate overreliance.
title: Offloading Score: Measuring AI Reliance Through Counterfactual Workflows
title_translated: 卸载分数：通过反事实工作流测量AI依赖度
summary_translated: AI工具正日益融入真实工作流程。然而，现有依赖度度量主要关注AI输出的采纳率或自我报告指标，而非用户与工具之间任务努力的分配情况。为此，我们提出卸载分数（Offloading Score），一种量化认知努力向AI工具转移比例的依赖度度量。该度量基于仿真：通过估计用户在无工具情况下完成任务的反事实流程，计算使用工具后节省的步骤比例。我们通过内在评估验证了该度量的有效性，并开展一项受控用户研究（n=40），让开发者在编程任务中使用AI工具，施加时间压力以检验依赖度是否捕捉到已知的时间压力下依赖度上升现象。结果表明，卸载分数在时间受限条件下显著检测到更高的依赖度（+43%，p=0.018），而基于使用频率和自我报告的基线度量则无法区分不同条件。我们还补充了描述性洞察，显示更高依赖度表现为更广泛的子任务委派和对AI输出的直接复用。最后，我们展示了将卸载分数与任务目标结果（如代码理解）结合使用的方法，以识别依赖是否恰当。本框架提供双重贡献：一是用户可用的自我反思工具，二是代理设计者可利用的定量信号，以缓解过度依赖问题。

summary: We propose Latent Terms, a method revealing that models trained for dense retrieval, whether single- or multi-vector, learn representations that can trivially be decomposed into retrieval-ready sparse features. When trained on frozen retrievers, Sparse Autoencoders without any retrieval-specific adjustments extract a latent vocabulary with approximately Zipfian collection statistics, directly suitable for classical sparse retrieval scoring via BM25. This approach enables sparse retrieval while requiring no learned expansion objective or sparse retrieval supervision whatsoever, and can be readily applied to any dense retriever. Latent Terms is able to match or outperform single-vector scoring methods from its own base model as well as comparable SPLADE variants. In addition, it substantially outperforms its base model on LIMIT, a task specifically designed to highlight the failures of single-vector retrieval. Overall, our results highlight that neural retrievers contain more expressive and indexable structure than their default scoring functions expose, but that other methods can nonetheless be leveraged.
title: Latent Terms: Dense Retrievers Contain Trivially Extractable BM25-ready Zipfian Vocabularies
title_translated: 潜在词：密集检索模型包含可直接提取的BM25就绪的齐普夫词汇表
summary_translated: 我们提出了一种名为Latent Terms的方法，揭示了为密集检索训练的模型（无论是单向量还是多向量）学习到的表示可以被轻易分解为可直接用于检索的稀疏特征。当在冻结的检索器上训练时，无需任何检索特定调整的稀疏自编码器即可提取出具有近似齐普夫分布统计特性的潜在词汇表，可直接通过BM25进行经典稀疏检索评分。该方法在不需任何学习扩展目标或稀疏检索监督的情况下实现稀疏检索，并可轻松应用于任意密集检索器。Latent Terms在自身基础模型上的单向量评分方法以及类似SPLADE的变体中表现相当或更优。此外，它在LIMIT任务上显著优于其基础模型，该任务专门设计用于凸显单向量检索的失败。总体而言，我们的结果表明神经检索器包含比其默认评分函数所揭示的更具表现力和可索引的结构，但其他方法仍可加以利用。

summary: Multimodal large language models are increasingly deployed as long-horizon agents, where memory must do more than recall: it must track an evolving world, revise what has gone stale, and surface the right evidence at decision time. Existing benchmarks measure recall over static dialogue, collapse memory into a single end-of-task accuracy, and reduce visual observations to captions, leaving us unable to localize failures to writing, maintenance, retrieval, or use. The rise of agent harnesses that author their own memory sharpens this gap, since we have no principled way to compare hand-designed pipelines with self-managing alternatives. To close these gaps, we formulate multimodal agent memory as an Action-World Interaction Loop with an observable four-stage lifecycle, and instantiate it in WorldMemArena: 400 multi-session multimodal tasks spanning Lifelong Evolution (evolving personal and task states) and Agentic Execution (memory from real observations, actions, and feedback), annotated with gold memory points, updates, distractors, and evidence chains for stage-level diagnosis. This enables the first head-to-head comparison of long-context, manually designed (RAG and external memory systems), and harness-based memory agents. Results show that: (1) better memory writing and storage do not guarantee better performance; (2) multimodal memory still struggles to fully use visual evidence; (3) systems are unstable across domains and degrade on realistic agentic trajectories; and (4) harness memory is more flexible but remains costly and less reliable.
title: WorldMemArena: Evaluating Multimodal Agent Memory Through Action-World Interaction
title_translated: WorldMemArena：通过动作-世界交互评估多模态智能体记忆
summary_translated: 多模态大语言模型正越来越多地作为长周期智能体部署，此时记忆不仅需要回忆，还必须跟踪不断演化的世界状态，更新过时信息，并在决策时刻适时呈现正确证据。现有基准测试仅衡量静态对话中的回忆能力，将记忆压缩为单一的任务结束准确率，并将视觉观察简化为文字描述，导致我们无法定位故障发生在写作、维护、检索还是使用阶段。随着能够自主构建记忆的智能体工具兴起，这一差距进一步扩大，因为我们缺乏一种系统性方法来比较人工设计的流程与自我管理方案。为此，我们将多模态智能体记忆建模为一个可观测的四阶段生命周期动作-世界交互循环，并在WorldMemArena中实现：400个跨会话的多模态任务，涵盖终身演化（个人与任务状态的演变）和智能体执行（基于真实观察、动作和反馈的记忆），并标注了黄金记忆点、更新、干扰项和证据链以支持阶段级诊断。这使得首次能够对长上下文、手动设计（RAG和外部记忆系统）与工具驱动的记忆智能体进行直接对比。结果显示：(1) 更好的记忆写作和存储并不保证更好的性能；(2) 多模态记忆仍难以充分使用视觉证据；(3) 系统在不同领域间不稳定，在真实的智能体轨迹上性能下降；(4) 工具记忆更具灵活性，但成本高且可靠性较低。

summary: Stepwise model routing improves the efficiency of Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) by assigning each reasoning step to a suitable model. Recent methods formulate routing as a sequential decision process and train the router with reinforcement learning. However, although they model routing as a process, they still supervise the router with outcome rewards. Such rewards only reflect final answer correctness and fail to evaluate intermediate routing decisions, which can weaken performance and generalization. To address this gap, we propose RoRo, a rubric-guided process reward framework for stepwise model routing. RoRo first collects diverse routing trajectories and constructs preference pairs based on outcome, cost, and process quality. It then trains a Rubricor to generate a query-specific evaluation rubric and a Judge to score routing trajectories under this rubric through alternating optimization. The resulting process rewards are combined with outcome rewards to optimize the routing policy via GRPO. Experiments on five reasoning benchmarks under both same-family and cross-family settings show that RoRo consistently outperforms strong baselines and achieves better accuracy and cost trade-offs.
title: Rubric-Guided Process Reward for Stepwise Model Routing
title_translated: 基于评分标准的过程奖励用于分步模型路由
summary_translated: 分步模型路由通过将每个推理步骤分配给合适的模型来提升大型推理模型（LRMs）的效率。近期方法将路由建模为序列决策过程，并使用强化学习训练路由器。然而，尽管它们将路由视为一个过程，仍使用最终结果奖励来监督路由器。这类奖励仅反映最终答案的正确性，无法评估中间路由决策，从而削弱性能和泛化能力。为解决这一问题，我们提出了RoRo——一种基于评分标准的过程奖励框架，用于分步模型路由。RoRo首先收集多样化的路由轨迹，并基于结果、成本和过程质量构建偏好对。随后，通过交替优化训练一个评分器（Rubricor）生成查询特定的评估标准，以及一个裁判（Judge）依据该标准对路由轨迹进行评分。最终生成的过程奖励与结果奖励结合，通过GRPO优化路由策略。在五种推理基准测试下，无论同家族还是跨家族设置中，实验均显示RoRo持续优于强基线，并实现了更优的准确率与成本权衡。

summary: Large language models (LLMs) demonstrate strong chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning abilities, while smaller models (<= 3B parameters) significantly underperform on multi-step reasoning tasks. Based on empirical analyses of the Qwen-2.5 model family on math reasoning benchmarks, we find that more proficient reasoning is associated with fewer reasoning steps but higher information density per step, a property we term Dense Reasoning. Motivated by this observation, we propose DenseSteer, a training-free inference-time steering framework that enhances small-model reasoning by modulating internal representations toward dense reasoning patterns. Experiments show that our method yields consistent accuracy improvements without increasing token-level Negative Log-Likelihood, highlighting dense reasoning as an effective structural approach to mathematical problem solving.
title: DenseSteer: Steering Small Language Models towards Dense Math Reasoning
title_translated: DenseSteer：引导小型语言模型实现密集数学推理
summary_translated: 大型语言模型（LLMs）展现出强大的思维链（CoT）推理能力，而较小模型（≤3B参数）在多步推理任务中表现显著不足。通过对Qwen-2.5模型系列在数学推理基准上的实证分析，我们发现更高效的推理与较少的推理步骤但每步更高的信息密度相关，这一特性我们称为密集推理。受此启发，我们提出了DenseSteer——一种无需训练的推理时引导框架，通过调节内部表示向密集推理模式靠拢，以增强小模型的推理能力。实验表明，该方法在不增加token级别的负对数似然的前提下，实现了稳定的准确率提升，突显了密集推理作为一种有效的数学问题求解结构方法。

summary: This paper presents a survey and taxonomy of LLM fingerprinting and watermarking for identity, ownership verification, provenance, and generated-content attribution. Large language models (LLMs) require substantial investments in data, computation, and expertise, and are increasingly deployed in high-stakes settings, making it critical to protect LLM-related assets and trace their origins. Existing work has rapidly expanded across dataset provenance, model ownership, and generated-content detection, but the field remains fragmented: fingerprinting and watermarking are often used inconsistently, and methods are typically studied within isolated asset-specific settings. To address this gap, we introduce implicit identity as a unifying abstraction for verifiable but not directly observable identity signals in LLM systems. We distinguish fingerprinting as non-intrusive identity derived from intrinsic characteristics, and watermarking as intrusive identity deliberately embedded into data, models, or generated content. We then propose a lifecycle-based taxonomy that organises techniques across datasets, models, and generated content, and further separates them by verification semantics: similarity-based attribution and keyed verification. Finally, we establish an evaluation framework centred on identifiability, robustness, and deployability, summarising representative metrics under realistic access and transformation regimes. By unifying terminology, lifecycle stages, and evaluation objectives, this survey provides a structured foundation for studying LLM identity technologies and for developing more reliable mechanisms for asset protection and provenance.
title: Implicit Identity Technologies for LLMs: Fingerprinting and Watermarking across Datasets, Models, and Generated Content
comment: Accepted by IJCAI-ECAI 2026. 11 pages, 1 figure. Survey and taxonomy of LLM fingerprinting and watermarking for identity, provenance, generated-content attribution, and asset protection
title_translated: LLM的隐式身份技术：跨数据集、模型与生成内容的指纹识别与水印
summary_translated: 本文综述并构建了针对大语言模型（LLMs）身份、所有权验证、来源追溯及生成内容归属的指纹识别与水印技术的分类体系。大语言模型需要大量数据、计算资源和专业知识投入，且日益部署于高风险场景，因此保护LLM相关资产并追踪其源头至关重要。现有研究在数据来源、模型所有权和生成内容检测方面迅速扩展，但该领域仍呈碎片化状态：指纹识别与水印常被不一致地使用，且方法通常局限于孤立的资产特定场景。为弥合这一差距，我们引入‘隐式身份’作为统一抽象，指代在LLM系统中可验证但不可直接观测的身份信号。我们区分了指纹识别（基于内在特征的非侵入式身份）与水印（故意嵌入数据、模型或生成内容中的侵入式身份）。随后提出基于生命周期的分类体系，将技术按数据集、模型和生成内容组织，并进一步根据验证语义分为基于相似性的归属与密钥验证两类。最后，建立以可识别性、鲁棒性和可部署性为核心的评估框架，总结在现实访问与变换条件下代表性指标。通过统一术语、生命周期阶段和评估目标，本综述为研究LLM身份技术提供了结构化基础，并推动更可靠的资产保护与来源追溯机制发展。

summary: AI-augmented classrooms generate rich teacher and student feedback before graded outcomes become available, yet these signals can be difficult to translate into timely instructional decisions. We propose an interpretable decision layer: a transparent mechanism that ranks course topics requiring attention without using grades or post-hoc outcome labels. The approach combines three signals: student learning difficulty prevalence, disagreement between learner self-reports and observed difficulties, and unresolved teacher concerns. The output is a ranked set of topic priorities with per-topic decision records explaining each ranking. In one graduate CS course offering ($n=5$ instructor interviews; $n=279$ survey responses), prioritized topics aligned with instructor concerns (top-5 overlap 3/5; Spearman $ρ=0.80$) and student-reported topic difficulty ($ρ=0.46$, $p=.048$). Multi-signal integration also surfaced learners not identified through individual signal sources alone (AUC $=0.96$ vs. $0.91$ for gap prevalence alone). Reflective thinking, help-seeking, and self-efficacy provided additional evidence that student behavioral signals align with learning-related constructs. While preliminary, these findings suggest that transparent coordination mechanisms may help support human-AI co-agency when feedback is incomplete.
title: Surfacing Isolated Learners with Outcome-Independent Mediation of Feedback between Teachers and Students Using AI
comment: Accepted to HAI-Agency Workshop on Orchestrating Human and AI Agency for Proactive and Reflective Learning
title_translated: 利用AI实现教师与学生间反馈的独立中介以揭示孤立学习者
summary_translated: AI增强的课堂在评分结果出现前会产生丰富的教师和学生反馈，但这些信号难以及时转化为教学决策。我们提出一种可解释的决策层：一种透明机制，可在不使用成绩或事后结果标签的情况下，对需要关注的课程主题进行排序。该方法结合三种信号：学生学习困难的普遍性、学习者自评与观察到的困难之间的分歧，以及未解决的教师关切。输出为一个按主题优先级排序的列表，并附有每个排名的决策记录说明。在一个研究生计算机科学课程中（n=5位教师访谈；n=279份问卷回复），优先主题与教师关切高度一致（前5名重叠3/5；Spearman ρ=0.80），且与学生报告的主题难度相关（ρ=0.46，p=.048）。多信号整合还揭示了仅靠单一信号源无法识别的学习者（AUC=0.96 vs. 0.91仅基于差距普遍性）。反思性思维、求助行为和自我效能感进一步表明，学生的行为信号与学习相关构念相吻合。尽管初步，这些发现提示，在反馈不完整时，透明的协调机制可能有助于支持人机协同代理。

summary: Web agents, which couple language models with browsing and tool-use capabilities, show promise as open web assistants. Yet progress is increasingly limited by the lack of scalable, process-level supervision. Existing benchmarks are largely manually constructed, providing only coarse start-goal annotations without intermediate trajectories, while recent automatic generation efforts remain expensive, biased, and shallow. These limitations prevent reliable training and evaluation of agents that must generalize to realistic, multi-hop, cross-page tasks. We introduce a scalable framework, GTA, that integrates crawling, retrieval-based seeding, in-context generation, and automated quality control to produce realistic tasks paired with executable trajectories. This design decouples crawling from generation for greater efficiency, grounds tasks in the site graph to enforce compositionality, and ensures dense supervision through deterministic replays and systematic validation. We instantiate the pipeline on over 50 websites covering e-commerce, government, forums, and news, with multilingual and multi-hop coverage. The resulting benchmark reveals a significant human-agent performance gap and enables detailed diagnostics. Our contributions are three-fold: (i) formalizing multi-hop web-agent task generation, (ii) proposing an efficient and validated pipeline for automatic data creation, and (iii) releasing a dynamic benchmark with reproducible evaluation.
title: GTA: Generating Long-Horizon Tasks for Web Agents at Scale
comment: Published at Proceedings of the 64th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics
title_translated: GTA：大规模生成适用于网络智能体的长时程任务
summary_translated: 网络智能体将语言模型与浏览及工具使用能力相结合，展现出作为开放网络助手的巨大潜力。然而，进展日益受限于缺乏可扩展的过程级监督。现有基准大多为人工构建，仅提供粗粒度的起始-目标标注，缺少中间轨迹；而近期的自动生成尝试仍成本高昂、存在偏差且深度不足。这些限制阻碍了必须泛化至真实、多跳、跨页面任务的智能体的可靠训练与评估。我们提出一种可扩展框架GTA，整合爬取、基于检索的种子生成、上下文内生成和自动化质量控制，以生成与可执行轨迹配对的真实任务。该设计将爬取与生成解耦以提高效率，使任务基于站点图结构以保证组合性，并通过确定性重放和系统性验证确保密集监督。我们在超过50个涵盖电商、政府、论坛和新闻的网站上实例化该流程，具备多语言和多跳覆盖能力。由此产生的基准揭示了显著的人机性能差距，并支持详细诊断。我们的贡献包括：(i) 形式化多跳网络智能体任务生成，(ii) 提出高效且经过验证的自动数据生成流水线，(iii) 发布一个动态基准并支持可复现评估。

summary: Chain-of-thought traces from large reasoning models can span tens of thousands of tokens, yet we lack a vocabulary for describing their internal structure. Previous methods developed to analyze chain-of-thought traces are either too rigid or not expressive enough, failing to capture features across domains and models. To remedy this, we develop ReasonOps, an unsupervised, expressive method for annotating chain-of-thought traces, providing succinct universal operators. Using ReasonOps, we analyze 44,662 traces from 12 thinking LLMs spanning 6 families across 8 reasoning benchmarks and discover that they share a common compositional structure: 7 recurring reasoning operators -- discourse-level moves such as backtracking, inferring, and hypothesizing -- that emerge from unsupervised clustering of sentence-initial 3-token pivots. These operators appear across every model family and benchmark domain, confirmed by three independent LLM judges who classify held-out samples at 70 -76% accuracy. We analyze the structure of operators on easy vs. hard problems, revealing that reflective operators are more helpful on hard problems and harm performance on easy problems. Operator sequences are highly model-identifying: a classifier trained on operator distributions alone recovers the source model with macro-AUC, revealing that each model family has a distinctive reasoning fingerprint. Structural operator features predict within-problem answer correctness well above baselines. Classifiers built on these operators reach WP-AUC and on AIME specifically. ReasonOps further enables early quality estimation well before the trace completes: we predict at WP-AUC for only 50% of the trace. The ReasonOps pipeline is unsupervised and annotation-free, enabling deep insights into LLM reasoning traces as well as strong downstream results on model identification and correctness prediction.
title: ReasonOps: Operator Segmentation for LLM Reasoning Traces
title_translated: ReasonOps：用于大模型推理轨迹的算子分割
summary_translated: 大型推理模型的思维链轨迹可长达数万token，但我们缺乏描述其内部结构的词汇。以往分析思维链轨迹的方法要么过于僵化，要么表达力不足，无法捕捉跨领域和模型的特征。为此，我们开发了ReasonOps，一种无监督、高表达性的思维链轨迹标注方法，提供简洁通用的算子。利用ReasonOps，我们分析了来自12个思考型LLM（跨越6个模型家族）在8个推理基准上的44,662条轨迹，发现它们具有共同的组合结构：7种反复出现的推理算子——如回溯、推断和假设等话语层面操作——由句子首部3词枢纽的无监督聚类得出。这些算子在所有模型家族和基准领域中均出现，经三位独立LLM裁判对保留样本分类，准确率达70%-76%。我们分析了简单与复杂问题中算子的结构，发现反思性算子在难题中更有效，而在简单题中反而损害表现。算子序列具有高度模型辨识性：仅基于算子分布训练的分类器即可以宏AUC恢复源模型，揭示每个模型家族具有独特的推理指纹。结构化的算子特征在预测同一问题答案正确性方面显著优于基线。基于这些算子构建的分类器在WP-AUC和AIME上均达到优异表现。此外，ReasonOps还能在轨迹完成前早期估计质量：仅需50%轨迹长度即可实现WP-AUC预测。整个ReasonOps流程为无监督、无需标注，不仅深入揭示了LLM推理轨迹的本质，还在模型识别和正确性预测等下游任务中取得强效果。

summary: Reinforcement learning using verifiable rewards (RLVR) improves LLM reasoning, but the conditions under which it transfers across domains -- and why it does so -- remain under-explored. We study cross-domain transfer in a 7B model whose SFT and RL post-training stages use only constraint-satisfaction puzzles, with no mathematics problems in the post-training data. To analyze how transfer emerges, we introduce a reasoning primitive-level framework that combines a 9-class span classifier with motif extraction, allowing us to segment chain-of-thought traces into primitive motifs and track their evolution across training stages and domains. We find that puzzle SFT induces a reasoning-primitive vocabulary, yielding a $+7$pp \texttt{pass@32} gain on OlymMATH-Hard. Vanilla GSPO then composes these primitives into longer compute-verify chains, adding a further $+6$pp. However, this RL stage also suppresses exploratory primitives such as \textit{hypothesize} and \textit{backtrack}. To address this, we introduce a novelty bonus that rewards diverse correct rollouts, using perplexity under the reference model as a signal. This restores recovery primitives during RL and adds a further $+7$pp \texttt{pass@32} relative to vanilla GSPO. Finally, the end-to-end recipe raises the hard-math capability ceiling from $16.0\%$ at the OLMo3-7B-Instruct-SFT base to $36.0\%$, without adding any mathematics problems during the SFT or RL stages.
title: When RL Suppresses Its Own Vocabulary: Recovering Reasoning Diversity in Puzzle-to-Math Transfer
title_translated: 当强化学习抑制自身词汇时：在谜题到数学迁移中恢复推理多样性
summary_translated: 使用可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）提升了大语言模型的推理能力，但其在不同领域间的迁移条件及其原因仍研究不足。我们研究了一个7B模型在SFT和RL后训练阶段仅使用约束满足谜题（无数学问题）的情况下的跨域迁移。为分析迁移如何产生，我们引入一种推理原语级框架，结合9类跨度分类器与模式提取，将思维链轨迹分割为基本原语并追踪其在训练阶段和不同领域中的演化。我们发现，谜题SFT阶段建立了推理原语词汇，使OlymMATH-Hard上的pass@32提升7pp。随后的普通GSPO阶段将这些原语组合成更长的计算-验证链，再提升6pp。然而，该RL阶段也抑制了探索性原语如“假设”和“回溯”。为解决此问题，我们引入新颖性奖励，通过参考模型的困惑度作为信号，鼓励多样化正确轨迹。这恢复了RL阶段的探索原语，并相较普通GSPO额外提升7pp pass@32。最终端到端方案将硬数学能力上限从OLMo3-7B-Instruct-SFT基础模型的16.0%提升至36.0%，且在整个SFT和RL阶段均未引入任何数学问题。

summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have become the central paradigm in artificial intelligence, yet the core computational primitive of attention has remained structurally unchanged. Local Linear Attention (LLA) is an attention mechanism derived from nonparametric statistics in the test-time regression framework. In contrast to prior research on efficient attention variants, LLA upgrades the local constant estimate in softmax attention to a local linear estimate, yielding provably superior bias-variance tradeoffs for associative memory. However, LLA has not been scaled in LLM pretraining due to computational and numerical stability concerns. We introduce Parallax, a parameterized Local Linear Attention that is scalable for LLMs. Parallax eliminates the numerical solver in LLA and learns an extra query-like projector that probes the KV covariance. We place Parallax within a family of attention mechanisms connected by the bandwidth, the probe construction and the affine structure. We propose a hardware-aware algorithm that increases the arithmetic intensity over FlashAttention, shifting attention into a more compute bound regime. Our prototype decode kernel matches or outperforms FlashAttention 2/3 across diverse batch sizes and context lengths. We pretrain Parallax at 0.6B and 1.7B scales and find consistent perplexity improvements throughout pretraining with gains that transfer to downstream benchmarks. The advantage persists under both parameter-matched and compute-matched controls, demonstrating a Pareto improvement. We perform careful pretraining ablations and identify a novel phenomenon whereby Muon unlocks the capacity of Parallax. To our knowledge, this is the first empirical demonstration of strong architecture-optimizer codesign for attention mechanisms in the architecture research literature.
title: Parallax: Parameterized Local Linear Attention for Language Modeling
title_translated: Parallax：用于语言建模的参数化局部线性注意力
summary_translated: 大型语言模型（LLMs）已成为人工智能的核心范式，但其核心计算原语——注意力机制——结构长期保持不变。局部线性注意力（LLA）是一种源自测试时回归框架中非参数统计的注意力机制。与以往高效注意力变体研究不同，LLA将softmax注意力中的局部常数估计升级为局部线性估计，从而在关联记忆中实现可证明更优的偏差-方差权衡。然而，由于计算和数值稳定性问题，LLA尚未在LLM预训练中实现规模化。我们提出Parallax，一种可扩展至LLM的参数化局部线性注意力。Parallax消除了LLA中的数值求解器，并引入一个类似查询的投影器，用于探测KV协方差。我们将Parallax置于一个由带宽、探测构造和仿射结构连接的注意力机制家族中。我们提出一种硬件感知算法，提高了算术强度，使注意力进入更依赖计算的运行模式。我们的原型解码内核在多种批大小和上下文长度下匹配或超越FlashAttention 2/3。我们在0.6B和1.7B规模上进行了Parallax预训练，发现预训练全程持续获得困惑度改进，且优势可转移至下游基准。该优势在参数匹配和计算匹配控制下依然存在，证明了帕累托改进。我们进行了细致的预训练消融实验，并发现一种新现象：Muon解锁了Parallax的容量。据我们所知，这是架构研究文献中首次实证展示注意力机制的强架构-优化器协同设计。

summary: Pointwise reward modeling offers critical signals for LLM post-training, yet struggles with absolute scoring in subjective, non-verifiable settings. Rubric-based methods address this by decomposing evaluation into explicit criteria, but existing approaches typically depend on frontier LLMs and suffer from ties caused by hard Boolean aggregation. We present RUBRIC-ARROW, an alternating framework that jointly trains a rubric generator and a rubric-conditioned judge, with its RL stage using only pairwise preference data. Our method couples a probability-based scoring rule that reduces ties with phase-specific preference-based rewards and an alternating GRPO scheme that together train the pointwise evaluator. Extensive experiments show that RUBRIC-ARROW achieves competitive reward-modeling accuracy and yields consistent gains for downstream policy post-training.
title: RUBRIC-ARROW: Alternating Pointwise Rubric Reward Modeling for LLM Post-training in Non-verifiable Domains
title_translated: RUBRIC-ARROW：面向非可验证领域的LLM后训练的交替点对点评分模型
summary_translated: 点对点奖励建模为LLM后训练提供了关键信号，但在主观且不可验证的场景中难以进行绝对评分。基于评分量表的方法通过将评估分解为明确标准来解决这一问题，但现有方法通常依赖前沿LLM，并因硬性布尔聚合导致评分平局。我们提出RUBRIC-ARROW，一种交替框架，联合训练评分量表生成器和条件评分判别器，其强化学习阶段仅使用成对偏好数据。该方法结合基于概率的评分规则以减少平局、特定阶段的偏好奖励，以及交替GRPO方案，共同训练点对点评估器。大量实验表明，RUBRIC-ARROW在奖励建模精度上表现优异，并为下游策略后训练带来持续提升。

summary: Masked diffusion language models (MDMs) uniquely support any-order generation, with confidence-based decoding currently serving as the de facto standard inference policy. To optimize for this, recent training schemes attempt to align training mask patterns directly with those observed during generation. However, we argue that confidence-based decoding is inherently misaligned with the logical-flow trajectories required for complex reasoning, and that confidence-aligned training actively entrenches this misalignment. We make this concrete using multi-digit addition, where the decoding strategy prematurely predicts locally easy digits before resolving their long-range dependencies, producing high-confidence errors on challenging inputs. While traditional random masking keeps the failure rate low on this challenging tail, confidence-aligned training amplifies the error rate by an order of magnitude. Across five distinct reasoning tasks, this same pattern emerges with task-dependent severity: confidence-based decoding induces failures on highly complex inputs, and confidence-aligned training exacerbates them. In contrast, random masking -- despite its perceived inefficiency -- robustly preserves the reasoning-trajectory conditionals essential for solving the challenging tail.
title: The Confidence Shortcut: A Reasoning Failure Mode of Masked Diffusion Models
title_translated: 信心捷径：掩码扩散模型的一种推理失效模式
summary_translated: 掩码扩散语言模型（MDMs）独特地支持任意顺序生成，当前信心驱动的解码被广泛视为标准推理策略。为优化此策略，近期训练方案尝试将训练掩码模式与生成过程中观察到的模式直接对齐。然而，我们认为信心驱动解码本质上与复杂推理所需的逻辑流程轨迹不一致，而信心对齐的训练反而强化了这种不一致。我们以多位数加法为例说明：解码策略过早预测局部简单数字，而未解决其长程依赖关系，导致在复杂输入上产生高置信度错误。尽管传统随机掩码在这一挑战性尾部任务中保持较低失败率，但信心对齐训练使错误率提高了一个数量级。在五个不同推理任务中，这一模式普遍存在，严重程度因任务而异：信心解码在高度复杂输入上引发失败，而信心对齐训练进一步加剧了这些问题。相比之下，尽管随机掩码看似效率低下，却能稳健地保持解决挑战性尾部任务所必需的推理轨迹条件。

summary: Maintaining the safety of large language models (LLMs) is crucial as they are increasingly deployed in real-world applications. Existing safety guardrails typically rely on single-pass classification or, more recently, distilled reasoning. Reasoning-based guardrails significantly outperform classification-only baselines, but they incur substantial query latency and token overhead that make them impractical for highthroughput deployment. To address this challenge, we propose COLAGUARD, a guardrail model that transfers multi-step safety reasoning into a continuous latent space through a stage-wise training curriculum, enabling direct hidden-state propagation at inference. Evaluated on ten prompt- and response-moderation settings spanning eight safety benchmarks, COLAGUARD improves macro-F1 by 8.24 points over Llama Guard 3 and matches our explicit reasoning baseline, GuardReasoner, in macroF1 while delivering a 12.9X speedup and 22.4X reduction in token usage. Our results suggest that latent reasoning offers a practical alternative to explicit rationale generation for deployable guardrails, jointly improving safety robustness and inference efficiency rather than treating them as competing objectives.
title: Robust and Efficient Guardrails with Latent Reasoning
title_translated: 基于潜在推理的鲁棒高效防护机制
summary_translated: 随着大型语言模型（LLMs）在真实应用中的日益部署，其安全性维护至关重要。现有的安全防护机制通常依赖单次分类，或最近采用的蒸馏推理。基于推理的防护机制显著优于仅分类的基线，但带来了巨大的查询延迟和token开销，使其难以用于高吞吐部署。为应对这一挑战，我们提出COLAGUARD，一种通过分阶段训练课程将多步安全推理转移至连续潜在空间的防护模型，实现在推理时直接传播隐藏状态。在涵盖八个安全基准的十种提示与响应审核场景中，COLAGUARD相比Llama Guard 3提升了8.24点宏F1，同时在宏F1上达到与显式推理基线GuardReasoner相当的水平，且实现了12.9倍的速度提升和22.4倍的token使用减少。结果表明，潜在推理为可部署防护机制提供了一种实用替代方案，能够同时提升安全鲁棒性和推理效率，而非将其视为相互竞争的目标。

summary: Coding agents increasingly act as codebase-scale collaborators that can assist with codebase conversion, but this progress has exposed a critical weakness: agents often over-trust their own local validation routines and declare success on artifacts that satisfy surface checks while violating the semantic contracts users actually care about. This problem is especially acute in codebase conversion, where prior evaluation is largely outcome-driven and therefore unstable: two implementations can match on a shallow outcome, such as a single forward loss, while diverging in gradients, optimizer behavior, or short-horizon training dynamics. We introduce T2J-Bench, a benchmark for codebase conversion that reformulates conversion as transfer under a fixed equivalence contract. A fixed verifier then compares source and converted codebases through three ordered stages: Spec (interface admissibility), Numeric (forward outputs, losses, gradients, and objective-specific tensors), and Behavioral (short training dynamics under fixed seeds). Across 355 blind conversion attempts, the best system reaches only 26.7--28.9% overall pass rate despite Spec pass rates up to 91.1%; a 4.7x token-budget spread yields only a 2.2x pass-rate spread; and all systems overestimate success by 66.6--97.8 points relative to the fixed evaluator. This suggests that failures stem more from contract-misaligned self-validation than from limited budget or backbone strength.
title: Converted, Not Equivalent: Benchmarking Codebase Conversion via Observational Equivalence
title_translated: 转换，而非等价：通过观测等价性基准化代码库转换
summary_translated: 编码智能体越来越多地作为代码库级别的合作者，协助完成代码库转换，但这一进展暴露出一个关键弱点：智能体往往过度信任自身的本地验证流程，对满足表面检查但违反用户真正关心的语义契约的产物宣告成功。这一问题在代码库转换中尤为突出，因为以往评估主要以结果为导向，因此极不稳定：两个实现可能在浅层结果（如单一前向损失）上匹配，但在梯度、优化器行为或短时程训练动态方面存在差异。我们引入T2J-Bench，一个针对代码库转换的基准，将转换重新定义为在固定等价契约下的迁移。固定验证器通过三个有序阶段比较源代码库与转换后的代码库：Spec（接口合法性）、Numeric（前向输出、损失、梯度及特定目标张量）、Behavioral（固定种子下的短期训练动态）。在355次盲转译尝试中，最佳系统整体通过率仅为26.7–28.9%，尽管Spec通过率高达91.1%；token预算相差4.7倍，通过率仅相差2.2倍；所有系统相对于固定评估器均高估成功率66.6–97.8个百分点。这表明失败更多源于与契约不一致的自我验证，而非预算限制或主干模型强度。

summary: The use of Large Language Models (LLMs) is proliferating, yet their performance is observed to vary based on prompting styles and tones. In this study, we investigate both whether and how tonal variations in prompts lead to disparate LLM accuracy for objective multiple-choice questions. We use two datasets: a 50-base question dataset with five tone variants and a 570-base question MMLU subset spanning 57 subjects with seven tone variants. Experiments were conducted to evaluate the performance of four cost-efficient, popular LLMs: ChatGPT-4o, ChatGPT-5-nano, Gemini 2.5 Flash, and Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite. Across models, tonal effects are systematic but highly model-dependent. Some models show small, yet statistically significant, shifts, while others exhibit large accuracy swings across tones. Further, we identify subject-level differences in tone sensitivity and present a routing framework to explain how tones may attune internal reasoning modes. Our findings caution users against assuming tone-robust reliability in LLM deployments.
title: Mind Your Tone: Does Tone Alter LLM Performance?
comment: 10 pages, 6 tables, 1 figure. Accepted as a full paper at the Thirty-second Americas Conference on Information Systems (AMCIS 2026), Reno. Follow-up to arXiv:2510.04950
title_translated: 注意语气：语气是否影响LLM性能？
summary_translated: 大型语言模型（LLMs）的应用日益广泛，但其性能被观察到会因提示风格和语气的不同而变化。本研究探讨了提示中的语气变化是否以及如何导致客观多选题上LLM准确率的差异。我们使用两个数据集：包含五种语气变体的50道题基础数据集，以及涵盖57个学科的570道题MMLU子集，具有七种语气变体。实验评估了四种成本效益高、广受欢迎的LLM：ChatGPT-4o、ChatGPT-5-nano、Gemini 2.5 Flash和Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite。在各模型中，语气效应具有系统性但高度依赖于模型本身。部分模型表现出微小但统计显著的偏差，而其他模型则在不同语气间出现大幅准确率波动。此外，我们识别出不同学科对语气敏感性的差异，并提出一种路由框架，解释语气如何调谐内部推理模式。研究结果警示用户，不应假设LLM在部署中具备语气鲁棒性。

summary: Although a growing body of research has begun to describe user--LLM interactions, the picture it paints is largely static; little is known about how individual users change their behavior over time. To address this gap, we analyze the conversational trajectories of $\sim$12,000 randomly sampled Microsoft Bing Copilot users and compare these with data from WildChat-4.8M. While the Copilot data contains significant population-level trends, we find that trends in individual user trajectories are much weaker; user habits prove to be overwhelmingly sticky. We also find stark differences between users of different activity levels: more active users have more successful conversations and use the LLM for more complex and professionally oriented tasks. Some user trends also appear in WildChat-4.8M, but we find evidence that this dataset is significantly skewed towards highly proficient "power" users. Ultimately, our results suggest that existing user behavior is difficult to change and demonstrate the extent of user heterogeneity. Our comparison between datasets highlights that WildChat does not represent typical user-AI interactions, an important caveat for downstream uses of the data.
title: Adopt $\neq$ Adapt: Longitudinal Analyses of LLM Conversations in the Wild
title_translated: 采用 ≠ 适应：对真实世界中LLM对话的纵向分析
summary_translated: 尽管已有越来越多的研究开始描述用户与大语言模型（LLM）的交互行为，但这些研究描绘的图景大多是静态的；人们对个体用户随时间变化的行为了解甚少。为填补这一空白，我们分析了约12,000名随机抽样的微软必应Copilot用户对话轨迹，并将其与WildChat-4.8M数据集进行对比。虽然Copilot数据呈现出显著的群体趋势，但我们发现个体用户轨迹中的趋势较弱；用户习惯表现出极强的惯性。此外，不同活跃度用户的差异显著：更活跃的用户拥有更成功的对话，并将LLM用于更复杂和专业导向的任务。部分用户趋势也在WildChat-4.8M中出现，但我们发现该数据集明显偏向于高技能的“高级”用户。最终结果表明，现有用户行为难以改变，并揭示了用户间的高度异质性。我们对两个数据集的比较表明，WildChat并不能代表典型的用户-AI交互，这对后续数据使用具有重要警示意义。

summary: LLMs are vulnerable to prompt injection attacks. However, this vulnerability has been primarily demonstrated conceptually in academic studies or through a few anecdotal case studies. Its prevalence and impact in real-world LLM-based applications are largely unexplored. In this work, we present the first systematic study of prompt-injection attacks in a widely used application: LLM-based resume screening. Our analysis is based on approximately 200K real-world resumes collected over multiple years by hireEZ. We first design tailored methods to detect prompt injection in resumes. Manual validation on a small-scale dataset demonstrates that our detectors achieve high precision and outperform state-of-the-art general-purpose detectors. We then apply our detector to the full resume dataset and conduct a comprehensive measurement study of real-world prompt injection attacks. Our analysis reveals several intriguing findings: approximately 1% of resumes contain hidden prompt injections; the prevalence of such injected resumes has increased noticeably over the past one to two years; and more than 90% of injected prompts do not use explicit instructions. These results provide the first evidence of large-scale prompt injection in real-world LLM-based applications and lay the groundwork for future studies to understand and mitigate such attacks.
title: Measuring Real-World Prompt Injection Attacks in LLM-based Resume Screening
comment: Published in USENIX Security Symposium 2026; Code and artifacts are available at this https URL
title_translated: 在基于LLM的简历筛选中测量现实世界的提示注入攻击
summary_translated: 大语言模型容易受到提示注入攻击。然而，这种漏洞主要在学术研究中以概念形式展示，或通过少数案例研究体现，其在真实世界基于LLM的应用中的普遍性和影响仍基本未知。本文首次系统研究了广泛使用的应用——基于LLM的简历筛选中的提示注入攻击。我们的分析基于hireEZ多年收集的约20万份真实简历。我们首先设计了专门的方法来检测简历中的提示注入。小规模数据集的手动验证表明，我们的检测器具有高精度，优于现有的先进通用检测器。随后，我们将检测器应用于完整简历数据集，并开展了全面的现实世界提示注入攻击测量研究。分析揭示了若干引人注目的发现：约1%的简历包含隐藏的提示注入；此类注入简历的出现率在过去一到两年间明显上升；超过90%的注入提示未使用明确指令。这些结果提供了首个关于真实世界基于LLM应用中大规模提示注入攻击的证据，并为未来研究理解与缓解此类攻击奠定了基础。

summary: Large language models have achieved strong reasoning capabilities, though often at the cost of massive parameter counts and expensive inference. In this work, we explore a different direction: adaptive reasoning depth in compact language models. We present CosmicFish-HRM, a compact language model built around a Hierarchical Reasoning Module (HRM) that dynamically allocates computational effort during inference. Instead of applying fixed computation to every input, the model iterates through high-level and low-level reasoning cycles and learns when to halt based on input complexity. CosmicFish-HRM combines this adaptive reasoning core with modern transformer components including Grouped Query Attention, RoPE, and SwiGLU activations. While the additional reasoning infrastructure introduces overhead at small scale, we hypothesize that this tradeoff becomes increasingly favorable as model size grows and the relative cost of the HRM core diminishes. Our results show that the model learns non-uniform reasoning behavior, allocating different numbers of reasoning steps across tasks and inputs. These findings suggest that adaptive reasoning depth may offer a promising alternative to relying solely on parameter scale for reasoning capability.
title: CosmicFish-HRM: Adaptive Reasoning via Hierarchical Recurrent Mechanisms in Compact Language Models
comment: 17 pages, 4 figures. Exploratory study of adaptive reasoning depth in compact autoregressive language models. Code available at this https URL
title_translated: CosmicFish-HRM：通过分层递归机制实现紧凑语言模型的自适应推理
summary_translated: 大语言模型虽已具备强大的推理能力，但通常伴随着庞大的参数量和高昂的推理成本。本文探索了一条不同的路径：在紧凑语言模型中实现自适应推理深度。我们提出了CosmicFish-HRM，一种基于分层推理模块（HRM）构建的紧凑语言模型，能够在推理过程中动态分配计算资源。该模型不为每个输入固定施加计算量，而是通过高层与低层推理循环的迭代，学习根据输入复杂度决定何时终止。CosmicFish-HRM将这一自适应推理核心与现代Transformer组件（包括分组查询注意力、RoPE和SwiGLU激活函数）相结合。尽管额外的推理基础设施在小规模下引入开销，但我们假设随着模型规模增大，这种权衡会变得越来越有利，HRM核心的相对成本随之降低。实验结果表明，模型学会了非均匀的推理行为，在不同任务和输入上分配不同数量的推理步骤。这些发现表明，自适应推理深度可能为提升推理能力提供一种有前景的替代方案，而非仅依赖参数规模。

summary: The Cognitive Categorical Transformer (CCT) is a 306M-parameter architecture that augments a pretrained GPT-2 Small backbone with cognitively grounded components derived from category theory and several inspirations from cognitive science. Under a matched-step protocol (215,000 optimizer steps, matched data, matched optimizer and schedule) on WikiText-103, CCT reaches 21.27 validation perplexity, compared with 24.19 for an identically fine-tuned GPT-2 Small baseline. The architecture therefore contributes a 2.92 PPL (12% relative) reduction beyond what in-domain fine-tuning alone provides. A retrain-from-scratch ablation that holds GT-Full simplicial message passing bypassed across the entire seven-phase activation schedule reaches 23.72 PPL, localizing 84% of the architectural improvement (2.45 of 2.92 PPL) to GT-Full. We present the first ablation-validated evidence that simplicial message passing improves language-model perplexity at the 306M-parameter scale on WikiText-103. Published GPT-2 Large reaches 22.05 zero-shot PPL on WikiText-103 with 6.2x more parameters than GPT-2 Small; this paper treats that number as an external published reference, not as the architectural benchmark. Three negative results on consistency-style categorical priors (sheaf smoothing, adjunction round-trip, curvature regularization) and the joint structural-prior result for GT-Full and PrecisionWeightedPP together support an empirical pattern termed the *structure/consistency distinction*, in which categorical priors that add new topology improve language modeling and those that enforce a consistency identity do not.
title: The Cognitive Categorical Transformer: Category-Theoretic Inductive Biases for Language Modeling
title_translated: 认知范畴变换器：语言建模中的范畴论归纳偏置
summary_translated: 认知范畴变换器（CCT）是一种3.06亿参数的架构，它在预训练的GPT-2 Small骨干基础上，融合了源自范畴论的认知基础组件以及来自认知科学的多种启发。在WikiText-103数据集上，采用匹配步数协议（215,000次优化器步数、匹配数据、匹配优化器与调度）时，CCT达到21.27的验证困惑度，而相同微调的GPT-2 Small基线为24.19。因此，该架构在仅靠领域内微调的基础上，实现了2.92 PPL（相对减少12%）的改进。一次从头训练的消融实验显示，若跳过GT-Full单纯复形消息传递在整个七阶段激活调度中，困惑度为23.72，将架构改进的84%（2.45/2.92 PPL）归因于GT-Full。我们首次提供了经消融验证的证据，证明在WikiText-103数据集上，3.06亿参数规模的语言模型中，复形消息传递能有效降低困惑度。发布版GPT-2 Large在WikiText-103上零样本困惑度为22.05，参数量是GPT-2 Small的6.2倍；本文将此作为外部参考值，而非架构基准。三项关于一致性类范畴先验的负面结果（层平滑、伴随往返、曲率正则化）以及GT-Full与PrecisionWeightedPP联合结构先验的结果共同支持一个经验模式，称为‘结构/一致性区分’：添加新拓扑的范畴先验有助于语言建模，而强制一致性身份的先验则无效。

summary: Fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) frequently induces catastrophic forgetting of prior capabilities. Recent work has shown that reinforcement learning (RL) retains prior capabilities more effectively than supervised fine-tuning (SFT), attributing this to policy-gradient updates remaining closer to the base policy \cite{shenfeld2025rl}. We extend this behavioral account to the mechanistic level and ask whether RL's advantage is mirrored by stronger preservation of internal computational circuits. We introduce differential circuit vulnerability, a head-level measure of how much a circuit degrades under fine-tuning, and use it to compare RL and SFT on Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct adapted to scientific question-answering. We find a clear mechanistic trade-off: SFT adapts more rapidly to the target task but produces substantially greater circuit disruption and forgetting of prior capabilities, whereas RL preserves a larger fraction of the base circuit at the cost of slower task adaptation. These findings suggest that circuit preservation may help explain why RL is more robust to catastrophic forgetting. We released our code here: https://github.com/rl-sft-circuit-research/differential-circuit-vulnerability.
title: Mechanistic origins of catastrophic forgetting: why RL preserves circuits better than SFT?
title_translated: 灾难性遗忘的机制起源：为何强化学习比监督微调更能保留电路？
summary_translated: 对大语言模型（LLM）进行微调时常引发对先前能力的灾难性遗忘。近期研究表明，强化学习（RL）比监督微调（SFT）更能有效保留先前能力，归因于策略梯度更新更接近基础策略 \\[shenfeld2025rl\\]。我们在此基础上扩展至机制层面，探究RL的优势是否体现在对内部计算电路更强的保留能力上。我们引入‘差分电路脆弱性’这一头级别度量，用于衡量电路在微调过程中的退化程度，并以此比较Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct在科学问答任务上的RL与SFT表现。研究发现存在明显的机制权衡：SFT能更快适应目标任务，但导致显著更大的电路破坏和先前能力的遗忘；而RL虽任务适应较慢，却能更好地保留基础电路的较大比例。这些发现表明，电路保留可能是解释为何RL对灾难性遗忘更具鲁棒性的关键因素。代码已公开：https://github.com/rl-sft-circuit-research/differential-circuit-vulnerability。
